name: Arun Kumar
text: Excellent care! Dr. Senthilrajan's expertise in stroke rehabilitation helped my father regain mobility faster than we expected.

name: Priya Ramesh
text: The personalized attention and modern equipment here are improved my recovery journey significantly. Highly recommend!

name: Karthik S.
text: Professional, compassionate, and result-oriented. The best physiotherapy center in the city for post-surgery rehab.

name: Meera Krishnan
text: Very supportive staff and a clean environment. The therapy sessions are well-structured and effective.

name: Rajesh T.
text: I came for back pain treatment, and the relief was immediate after a few sessions. Thank you, ProCare!
